## Why / 背景

## Changes / 变更

-

## Screenshots or recordings / 截图或录屏

- UI changes: attach screenshots, a GIF, or a short video.
- 界面变更：请附上截图、GIF 或短视频。

## Tests / 测试

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Manual validation / 手动验证

- [ ] Loaded the extension from `dist` and checked the changed behavior on `https://chat.deepseek.com/`.
- [ ] If the change touches UI, checked both light and dark themes.
- [ ] If the change adds user-facing text, added both `zh-CN` and `en-US` i18n entries.
- [ ] 如果改动涉及界面，已检查浅色和深色主题。
- [ ] 如果改动新增用户可见文案，已同时添加 `zh-CN` 和 `en-US` 文案。

## Notes / 备注

-
